info.description: API for the Rack Gateway administration and proxy services.
info.title: Rack Gateway API

get.description: Returns all API tokens configured in the system.

post.description: Generates a new API token for automation or CI/CD use.

get.description: Returns the permission catalog and metadata used to build API token forms.
Returns metadata for a specific API token.

put.description: Updates token metadata such as name and permissions.

get.description: Returns environment variables for a Convox app, masking secrets unless authorized.

put.description:
Applies environment variable changes for a Convox app by creating a new release.
Secrets remain masked unless the user has secrets permissions.

get.description: Returns all settings for a specific app with their sources

put.description: Updates multiple app settings atomically and stores them in the database

delete.description: Deletes multiple app settings from the database, reverting to env or default values

put.description: Replaces the approved deploy commands for the specified app

delete.description: Removes approved deploy command overrides for the specified app

put.description: Replaces the list of protected environment variables for the specified app

delete.description: Removes protected environment variable overrides for the specified app

put.description: Replaces the list of secret environment variables for the specified app

delete.description: Removes secret environment variable overrides for the specified app

put.description: Replaces service image constraints for the specified app

delete.description: Removes service image pattern overrides for the specified app

get.description: Returns paginated audit logs filtered by optional query parameters.
Streams the filtered audit log dataset as CSV.
Stores the OAuth authorization code for the CLI to finish login.

post.description: Exchanges the stored authorization code and PKCE verifier for a session token.

get.description: Displays the MFA challenge form for CLI login.

post.description: Initiates the CLI OAuth flow and returns PKCE parameters.
Generates a new set of MFA backup codes. All prior codes become invalid.
Confirms the TOTP secret using a verification code and optionally trusts the device.
Generates a TOTP secret, provisioning URI, and backup codes for the authenticated user.
Completes WebAuthn credential registration with the client's credential response.
Begins WebAuthn credential registration. Returns a challenge for the browser.
Enrolls a Yubikey using Yubico OTP. Touch your Yubikey to generate an OTP.

put.description: Updates the label of an MFA method

delete.description: Removes an existing MFA method for the current user.

put.description: Sets the user's preferred MFA method for sign-in (totp or webauthn)

get.description: Returns enrollment state, configured methods, trusted devices, and backup code summary.
get.summary: Get MFA status for current session

post.description: Marks the current browser session as trusted by minting a trusted device cookie.

delete.description: Revokes a trusted device, requiring MFA on next login from that device.

post.description: Verifies a TOTP or backup code to satisfy the MFA step-up requirement.
Begins a WebAuthn assertion ceremony for CLI login/step-up. Returns challenge and session data.
Completes the WebAuthn assertion ceremony by validating the signed response.

get.description: Validates the OAuth callback, issues a session cookie, and redirects to the SPA.
Redirects the browser to the identity provider for login.

parameters.description: URL to redirect to after successful login (must start with /app/)
parameters.name: returnTo

get.description: Revokes the active session, clears the cookie, and redirects to the login screen.
Returns creator information for the supplied resource identifiers.
Returns a list of deploy approval requests with optional filtering

parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, approved, rejected, expired)
parameters.name: status

post.description: Approves a deploy approval request and optionally triggers CircleCI job approval

get.description: Returns audit logs for a specific deploy approval request
get.summary: Get audit logs for a deploy approval request

post.description: Extends the expiry time for an approved deploy approval request
post.summary: Extend a deploy approval request expiry

post.description: Rejects a deploy approval request with optional notes

get.description: Returns service health information.
Returns user, rack, and integrations status in a single request for app bootstrap
Returns a list of background jobs with optional filtering
Returns details of a specific background job by ID

delete.description: Cancels a background job by ID

post.description: Immediately retries a background job by ID

get.description: Proxies the rack /system endpoint returning the rack's metadata.
Returns metadata and permissions for each gateway RBAC role.
Returns all global settings with their sources (db, env, or default)

put.description: Updates multiple global settings atomically and stores them in the database

delete.description: Deletes multiple global settings from the database, reverting to env or default values

post.description: Fetches and stores the latest TLS certificate for the configured Convox rack.

get.description: Returns a single global setting with its source
Returns every user configured in the gateway along with role assignments.

post.description: Creates a new gateway user with the provided roles.

get.description: Returns details for a single gateway user.

put.description: Updates a user's email, name, and/or roles in a single request.

delete.description: Removes a gateway user and revokes all sessions they own.

post.description: Locks a user account to prevent login

put.description: Updates only a user's display name.

get.description: Returns the active (non-revoked) web sessions for the specified user.
get.summary: List active sessions for a user

post.description: Revokes every active session belonging to the specified user.
post.summary: Revoke all sessions for a user

post.description: Revokes a single session for the specified user.
Unlocks a previously locked user account

Settings.description: Map of setting keys to values

CSRFToken.description: HMAC-derived CSRF token tied to the active session.
CSRFToken.name: X-CSRF-Token

SessionCookie.description: HttpOnly session cookie issued after OAuth login.
SessionCookie.name: Cookie

response_time_ms.description: Mapped to AvgResponseTimeMs for frontend consistency

role.description: Role shortcut (viewer, ops, deployer, cicd, admin)

session_data.description: SessionData is the serialized session to send back with verification
